apiBaseUrl.label: ClawMem API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.help: Base URL of an already-running ClawMem REST API. The plugin never starts a binary.

apiToken.label: ClawMem API Token
apiToken.help: Optional bearer token. If omitted, CLAWMEM_API_TOKEN from the environment is used.

tokenBudget.label: Context Token Budget
tokenBudget.help: Metadata budget hint retained for compatibility (default: 800)

enableTools.label: Register Agent Tools
enableTools.help: Register ClawMem retrieval tools for agent-initiated API queries
